hero.tagline: GoHighLevel Expert & N8N Advanced Workflow Automation Specialist. I build AI Chatbots, Voice Agents, Lead Capture Systems, and end-to-end Business Process Automations that scale your operations and save hundreds of hours.

about.heading: About Me
about.description: I am an Automation & AI Expert specializing in GoHighLevel CRM, N8N Advanced Workflows, AI Chatbot & Voice Agent Automation, and full-stack Business Process Automation. With deep expertise in building complex multi-step automation systems, I help businesses automate lead capture, nurturing, sales funnels, appointment booking, and CRM pipelines — saving hundreds of hours and driving measurable growth.

details: Building AI Chatbots, Voice Agents & Workflow Automations
GoHighLevel CRM & N8N Advanced Automation Systems

education.degree: Bachelor of Science in Computer Science & Engineering

education.institution: Mirpur Bangla High School and College

featuredProjects.title: AI Chatbot for OptimalMD Portal Users using n8n & GoHighLevel API
featuredProjects.tech: n8n, GoHighLevel API, AI Chatbot, REST API
featuredProjects.description: Built a secure AI-powered chatbot for OptimalMD portal users using n8n and GoHighLevel API. The system verifies user identity in real time — verified users get full automated assistance, while unauthorized users are restricted. Combines workflow automation with API integration for instant, secure support.

featuredProjects.title: AI Operations Assistant with Real-Time Task Automation
featuredProjects.tech: n8n, OpenAI API, Webhook, Task Automation
featuredProjects.description: Developed an AI-powered operations assistant that automates real-time task management and workflow execution. The system intelligently processes incoming requests, routes tasks to appropriate handlers, and executes multi-step operations autonomously — reducing manual workload and response time dramatically.

featuredProjects.title: Complete CRM Setup for Amigo Advisors Using GoHighLevel (GHL)
featuredProjects.tech: GoHighLevel, CRM, Pipeline Automation, Lead Nurturing
featuredProjects.description: Designed and implemented a complete CRM system for Amigo Advisors using GoHighLevel. Built custom pipelines, automated lead capture workflows, follow-up sequences, appointment booking, and reporting dashboards — transforming their sales process from manual to fully automated.

featuredProjects.title: AI Voice Agent for Law Firm | GHL Automation System
featuredProjects.tech: VAPI AI, GoHighLevel, Twilio, Voice Automation
featuredProjects.description: Built an AI-powered voice agent for a law firm that handles inbound and outbound calls, qualifies leads, books appointments, and manages follow-ups — all integrated with GoHighLevel CRM. The voice agent operates 24/7, ensuring no lead is missed and every call is handled professionally.

featuredProjects.title: Real Estate Web Scraping Automation for Foreclosure Lead Generation
featuredProjects.tech: Apify, Web Scraping, Data Automation, Lead Generation
featuredProjects.description: Developed an automated web scraping system for real estate foreclosure lead generation. The system extracts property listings, owner data, and foreclosure details from multiple sources, cleans and structures the data, and delivers enriched lead lists ready for outreach — saving hours of manual research.

featuredProjects.title: AI 24/7 WooCommerce Chatbot with Messenger Automation
featuredProjects.tech: AI Chatbot, WooCommerce, Messenger API, Automation
featuredProjects.description: Created an AI-powered chatbot for WooCommerce stores that provides 24/7 customer support through Facebook Messenger. The bot handles product inquiries, order tracking, FAQs, and purchase assistance — driving conversions and reducing support tickets with intelligent automated responses.

projects.description: Developed a comprehensive desktop application for pharmacy inventory, sales, and customer data, featuring online ordering and stock alerts.

projects.title: Advanced NLP Models for Text Classification
projects.description: Implemented and fine-tuned BERT and BioBERT models on general and PubMed datasets to build a robust text classification system for specialized NLP tasks.

projects.title: Railway Management System
projects.description: Designed and developed a comprehensive Oracle database system to efficiently manage train schedules, passenger bookings, and customer data.

research.title: Analysis of Soil Salinity and Earth Metal Concentrations Along River Distance Gradients in The Sundarbans
research.description: Collected and analyzed soil samples along river gradients in the Sundarbans to assess salinity levels and heavy metal concentrations, identifying spatial patterns and environmental risks.
